# ORION Plugins

Fonte: `plugins/plugin.schema.json` e manifestos sob `plugins/installed/*/plugin.json`.

Carregamento de plugins permanece desabilitado na fundacao atual.

## Contrato Do Manifesto

| Campo | Tipo | Obrigatorio | Descricao |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | sim | Stable lowercase plugin identifier. |
| `name` | `string` | sim | Human-readable plugin name. |
| `version` | `string` | sim | Plugin semantic version. |
| `minimum_orion_version` | `string` | sim | Minimum compatible ORION version. |
| `entrypoint` | `string` | sim | Future isolated plugin entrypoint. |
| `permissions` | `array[string]` | sim | Explicit capabilities requested by the plugin. |
| `signature` | `string` | sim | Future detached digital signature metadata. |
| `checksum` | `string` | sim | Future package integrity digest. |
| `author` | `string` | sim | Plugin author or publisher. |
| `description` | `string` | sim | Plugin purpose. |
| `commands` | `array[string]` | sim | Commands exposed through the future internal API. |
| `consumed_events` | `array[string]` | sim | Events consumed through the future Event Bus. |
| `published_events` | `array[string]` | sim | Events published through the future Event Bus. |

## Inventario Instalado

| ID | Nome | Versao | Autor |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| - | Nenhum plugin instalado | - | - |

## Seguranca

A Wiki nunca publica assinatura, checksum, permissoes concedidas ou valores de configuracao de plugins.
